description: Extends the org-shared FS-GG preset (github>FS-GG/.github), which provides config:recommended + dependency dashboard + semantic commits, the FS.GG.* registry routing, the FS.GG.UI coherent-set grouping, and the shared custom managers. This repo adds two managers: (1) moves the single FS.GG.UI.Template version pin in providers/rendering.providers.yml + README when Rendering publishes (replacing the retired scripts/sync-from-rendering.sh), and (2) moves the FS-GG/.github commit SHA that the composition gate fetches skill-union-assert.sh at, pinned in tests/composition/lib/skill-union.sh (issue #56 — a pinned ref, never @main; the pin moved out of run.sh into the skill-union lib in review A3).

ignorePaths RESTATES config:recommended's :ignoreModulesAndTests list MINUS `**/tests/**`, and that one omission is the entire point of the field. Manager (2)'s pin lives at tests/composition/lib/skill-union.sh, which `**/tests/**` matched — so Renovate skipped the file before any manager ran and the manager NEVER fired once. The regex was never wrong: it matches the file today. The path was excluded underneath it, which is why this failed SILENTLY rather than erroring, with this same config file asserting the pin was tracked. Cost: SKILL_ASSERT_REF froze at ab6d9289 (2026-07-02) while FS-GG/.github@main moved 9 commits ahead — including a skill-union fail-open fix (.github#385, quoted-literal predicate) — so the composition gate ran a two-week-old assertion it believed was current. This repo keeps a load-bearing pin under tests/, so it cannot use the stock ignore list. Do NOT re-add `**/tests/**`.

packageRules.description: Rewrite the exact pinned FS.GG.UI.* value rather than widening a range (the pin coherence that tests/composition/run.sh enforce).

customManagers.description: Detect the FS.GG.UI.Template version pinned in the rendering provider descriptor and the README, in every surrounding form (`::`, `@`, `/v`). Renovate updates all matched occurrences together, preserving the pin coherence.

Bump the FS-GG/.github commit SHA that the composition gate fetches the shared skill-union-assert.sh at (issue #56, review F4). @main is a moving target; this tracks the main branch head via the git-refs datasource and rewrites the 40-char SHA in place, keeping ONE source of truth AND a deterministic gate. The pin (SKILL_ASSERT_REF) and its inline `# renovate:` annotation live in tests/composition/lib/skill-union.sh (moved out of run.sh in review A3's split).

hostRules.description: read:packages auth for the private org GitHub Packages NuGet feed (FS.GG.* are not on nuget.org). Lives in this repo's own config — NOT the shared preset — because Renovate does not substitute {{ secrets }} inside presets pulled via extends. Value = org-level Mend App Secret FSGG_PACKAGES_READ_TOKEN.
